title: Google AP2 Checkout/Payment Mandate (VDC) Builder & Validator
description: Builds and validates Google Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) Checkout Mandate and Payment Mandate Verifiable Digital Credentials across Open/Closed stages. This targets the EXTERNAL Google/FIDO AP2 spec (ap2-protocol.org), distinct from the AINumbers Policy Mandate export. Field names are illustrative — verify against the AP2 spec.

mcp_tool_definition.name: build_google_ap2_mandate
mcp_tool_definition.description: Build or validate a Google AP2 Checkout/Payment Mandate VDC (Open/Closed). Targets the external AP2 spec, not the AINumbers Policy Mandate.
